arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany addresses Bayern Munich criticism ahead of PSG clash
arts.sum: After failing to beat Bayer Leverkusen, Aston Villa, Eintracht Frankfurt or Barcelona this season, Bayern Munich head coach Vincent Kompany has addressed criticism that the Rekordmeister haven’t won a ‘big…

arts.ttl: Jan-Christian Dreesen hopeful Bayern Munich will agree on an extension with Jamal Musiala
arts.sum: By all accounts, Bayern Munich is ready and willing to make Jamal Musiala one of the club’s highest earners alongside Harry Kane with what reports are suggesting the club is ready to offer him for the proposed contract extension. While talks between the club and Musiala over the new deal have been positive thus far, Dreesen did not want to put any sort of specific timetable on getting the deal over the line to create any unnecessary pressure on anyone externally or internally.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich manager Vincent Kompany labels PSG ‘one of the biggest clubs in Europe’
arts.sum: Bayern Munich manager Vincent Kompany has described Paris Saint-Germain as “one of the biggest clubs in Europe” ahead of their UEFA Champions League meeting on Tuesday. PSG are enduring a difficult…
Aidan Perkins looks ahead to all 18 games in the Champions League this week and has a score prediction for each clash.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund’s Lars Ricken on facing Bayern Munich at the weekend: “We will win it!”
arts.sum: Speaking at Borussia Dortmund’s Annual General Meeting (via Sky Germany), Director of Sport Lars Ricken has issued a challenge to Bayern Munich ahead of their game on Saturday. Dortmund go…
As reported by Florian Plettenburg, Bayern Munich’s 2025 transfer priority will be the signing of Florian Wirtz from Bayer Leverkusen. The club will plan to save money in the first…

arts.ttl: PSG President shares update on Luis Enrique’s status as manager and hints about his future
arts.sum: Luis Enrique doesn’t have to worry about his job in the dugout at Paris Saint-Germain, despite the Spaniard coming in for criticism for the club’s struggles in the UEFA Champions…

arts.ttl: Premier League boost as Bayern Munich make €100m transfer decision
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are not prioritising the addition of a striker and instead focusing their efforts on signing Florian Wirtz from Bayer Leverkusen next summer. The German side have been heavily linked with rivalling Premier League clubs in the bidding to sign Viktor Gyokeres from Sporting Lisbon and Eintracht Frankfurt forward Omar Marmoush. Gyokeres is […] The post Premier League boost as Bayern Munich make €100m transfer decision first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Could Bayern Munich redeploy Leroy Sané on the left wing vs. Paris Saint-Germain?
arts.sum: Could a swap for Sané — back to the left wing, where he enjoyed success at Manchester City under Pep Guardiola — be the solution Bayern needs? Surely Kompany — whose playing days at City coincided with Sané’s left winger days — has thought about it.

arts.ttl: Manchester City’s Erling Haaland lauds PSG’s Champions League credentials
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have endured a torrid time in this season’s UEFA Champions League. With just one win, which came courtesy of a last-minute Paulo Gazzaniga howler in their opener against…
